subcodes.title: Words to May Maxwell et al, spoken around 1898-02-25
subcodes.first_line: Now the time has come when we must part, but the separation is only of our bodies... Another commandment give I unto you! That ye love one another as I love you....Behold a candle and how it gives its light. It weeps its life away, drop by drop, in order to give forth its flame of light.
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love and unity, @spiritual transformation
